title: Senate Interspecies Advisory Committee
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Senate Interspecies Advisory Committee''' was an organization established by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] that aimed to limit inter-species tension, and mediate an end to various inter-species conflicts that often occurred throughout the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]. The committee consisted of Senators, Jedi and other experts.

[[Jorus C'baoth]] once was a member of the Committee.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
